notes: Script completed: mkdir -p .workflow/fabro; node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const {spawnSync}=require('child_process'); const run=(cmd,args=[])=>{const r=spawnSync(cmd,args,{encoding:'utf8',timeout:45000}); return {cmd:[cmd,...args].join(' '), status:r.status, stdout:(r.stdout||'').trim().slice(0,400), stderr:(r.stderr||'').trim().slice(0,400)};}; const checks=[run('node',['--version']),run('npm',['--version']),run('bun',['--version']),run('qlty',['--version']),run('spec-kitty',['--version']),run('promptfoo',['--version']),run('claude',['--version']),run('codex',['--version']),run('curl',['-fsS','--max-time','20','https://api.github.com/rate_limit'])]; const env=['OPENROUTER_API_KEY','DAYTONA_API_KEY','LINEAR_API_KEY','FABRO_SLACK_BOT_TOKEN','FABRO_SLACK_CHANNEL_ID','APIFY_TOKEN'].reduce((acc,key)=>{const value=process.env[key]||''; const unresolved=value.charCodeAt(0)===123 && value.charCodeAt(1)===123; acc[key]=Boolean(value && !unresolved); return acc;},{}); const required=['node --version','npm --version','bun --version','qlty --version','spec-kitty --version','promptfoo --version','curl -fsS --max-time 20 https://api.github.com/rate_limit']; const failed=checks.filter((check)=>required.includes(check.cmd) && check.status!==0); const report={ok:failed.length===0, failed, checks, env}; fs.writeFileSync('.workflow/fabro/daytona-environment-smoke.json', JSON.stringify(report,null,2)+'\n'); console.log(JSON.stringify(report,null,2)); if(!report.ok) process.exit(1);"
